chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4571 of 2021 Syed Iftikhar Ahmed Versus Managing Director PPL & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.18810/21 2. For orders on Misc. No.18811/21 3. For orders on Misc. No.18812/21 4. For hearing of main case Dated: 27.07.2021 Mr. Ashiq Muhammad for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel, after arguing the matter at some length, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
